Creates a decide workspace proposal admission.

## Import

```ts
import { decideWorkspaceProposalAdmission } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function decideWorkspaceProposalAdmission(
	record: WorkspaceProposalRecorded,
	material: WorkspaceProposalAdmissionMaterial,
	options: WorkspaceProposalProjectorOptions = {},
): WorkspaceProposalAdmissionResult
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `record` | `WorkspaceProposalRecorded` | Record to encode, validate, or project. |
| `material` | `WorkspaceProposalAdmissionMaterial` | Audit or decision material used by the projector. |
| `options` | `WorkspaceProposalProjectorOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

The decide workspace proposal admission result.

## Example

```ts
import { decideWorkspaceProposalAdmission } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item/scheduling";
```
